name: The Enigma
overview: A group of hunters travel to branches of time, attempting to find and capture the dangerous entity that create them, The Enigma. Never being able to catch the entity, they rely on destroying the branches to prevent any more destruction to the main time line. Everything changes once a random thief, from a branch in the year 2024, accidentally ties himself with The Enigma. Reide, a hunter, makes an agreement with the thief to work together and use this new found connection to finally capture the entity. This unlikely friendship leads to them learning more about the history of it all and why things aren't what they seem to be.
